scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:ci --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run build:ci --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm ci --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('backend/public',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync('frontend/dist','backend/public',{recursive:true});" && npm ci --prefix backend && cd backend && npx prisma generate
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && node server.js
